name: cc-tools
description: cc-tools — the tools layer of the cc-* harness: single-purpose product skills. /find-goal captures the product's North Star and charts a roadmap; /what-to-do ranks where a product could go next; /how-to-do thinks one fork through to ONE decision; /do builds one task to a smoke-checked finish, then hands off to /refactor-review-test, which hardens it (behavior-preserving refactor, /code-review, full tests) and commits; /slap resets a stuck fix. Driven by cc-agent (the musician) and supervised by cc-maestro.
